entries.name: Timeline Convergence
entries.description: Process where sufficiently similar timeline branches phase-lock and share transfer windows.

entries.name: Resonance Likeness
entries.description: Compatibility rule governing whether branches can approach and merge safely.

entries.name: Consciousness Anchor
entries.description: Mind-state coherence acting as a local stabilizer during convergence windows.

entries.name: Fermi Paradox Inversion
entries.description: Reframe that apparent alien encounters are adjacent human lineages, not distant species.

entries.name: Bundle Civilization
entries.description: Future social form where multiple history-lines operate as one integrated society thread.
